ingredients_text: Mayonnaise (soybean oil, eggs, water, distilled vinegar, contains less than 2% of salt, sugar, lemon juice concentrate, calcium disodium edta added to protect flavor, natural flavors), chili sauce (red chili, white vinegar, sugar, salt, garlic, acetic acid, lactic acid, red chili powder, xanthan gum, potassium sorbate & sodium bisulfite added as preservatives).
